title: The Four-Ball Genus
description: The golem has been tested with 2 ingredients. Deduce the reaction pattern and identify the target group.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing6: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing2: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive

Chest reacts to G+L. Ears react to B+L. Animation rule: Large reaction → '+', Small reaction → '−'. So animation ingredients must have G+ AND B+. Cross-reference with the mixing clues to identify those ingredients.
The animators are: ingredients [5, 6]. Alch: ing5→nPp, ing6→PPP.
